div.head: 132. Editorial Note
div.p: In a memorandum to James S. Lay, Jr., September 21, Bromley Smith stated that at a meeting on September 16 the OCB Board Assistants noted that the Working Group for the West Indies had completed its semiannual appraisal of NSC 6002/1, and that the Assistants concurred in the judgment that there was no need for an NSC review of the policy nor any developments significant enough to warrant sending a report to the NSC. (Department of State, S/S–OCB Files: Lot 61 D 385, West Indies—Documents)
